title: oenothera × purpurans
intro: Oenothera × purpurans, commonly known as evening primrose, is a natural hybrid plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. It is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that plays a crucial role in reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. The health benefits of evening primrose oil include alleviating symptoms of menopause, eczema, and rheumatoid arthritis, as well as supporting heart health and improving skin conditions. Evening primrose oil can be prepared through cold pressing of the seeds, and it is often used in herbal supplements, cosmetics, and topical applications to harness its medicinal and moisturizing properties.
